g.text: Generates RST changelog for the airflowctl release and prepends it to RELEASE_NOTES.rst.
GitHub token used to authenticate. You can omit it if you have GITHUB_TOKEN env variable set.
Git ref (tag or hash) of the previous release. Example: airflow-ctl/0.1.3
Git ref for the end of the range. Defaults to HEAD (pre-tagging).
Version string for the release being prepared. Example: 0.1.4
Comma-separated list of PRs to exclude.
Write the RST section to this file instead of prepending to airflow-ctl/RELEASE_NOTES.rst.
Print verbose information about performed steps.
